title: Bare Bones x Magex's Shelf Shrooms
description: Bare Bones textures for Magex's Shelf Shrooms ! 🍄
body:
This resource pack adds Bare Bones textures for [Magex's Shelf Shrooms](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/magexs-shelf-shrooms) !

You have to place it above the default Magex's Shelf Shrooms in the resource pack list
